Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf Rosalie Justus To Travel To San Francisco And To Submit To A Psychiatric Mental Examination; Or Alt/ Order Barring Pltf From Presenting Any Evidence Of A Psychological Injury ;
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Byron Philhour's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Travel To San Francisco To Submit To Psychiatric-Mental Examination granted; examination to proceed per notice; provided, however, defendant shall advance all costs of plaintiff's travel and accommodations as required to attend examination. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order For Arbitration
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and Defendant. Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order For Arbitration is heard this day. Following Defendant's waiver of defective notice and there being no opposition by Defendant's Counsel court ordered motion granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Court ordered Case scheduled for a Jury Trial on 11/10/2008 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR#11055. (212)
